articles.title: Payton Tolle gets standing ovation after tossing seven scoreless innings vs. Yankees
articles.description:
Tolle said postgame he was battling an illness prior to his outstanding start Friday.

The post Payton Tolle gets standing ovation after tossing seven scoreless innings vs. Yankees appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Payton Tolle pitched seven scoreless innings against the Yankees on June 27.
Tolle received a standing ovation from fans at Fenway Park after his performance.
His success boosts the Red Sox's morale and playoff hopes for Boston residents.
